meaning: adv.adj.向后地(的),相反地(的),追溯,退步,由好变坏
examples: The diver flipped over backward into the water.
He unlocked the door of apartment two and disappeared inside after a backward glance at Larry.
She was walking backward on the walkway.
The mother warthog ran after him at a surprising speed, grunting and repelling him backward.
Gayle took a liking to Plunkett, thrashing him through the covers, down the ground and over backward point.
